name: grimoire
description: A grimoire of leverage — spells (skills), incantations (commands), and familiars (agents) that move the work. Public collection of original and forked Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: starter-spell
plugins.description: Reference template — copy this folder to conjure a new plugin. Ships one live example of every component type.

plugins.name: archmage
plugins.description: Sparx Enterprise Architect modeling via MCP, plus UML 2.5.1 / BPMN 2.0.2 / ArchiMate 3.2 / TOGAF Standard, 10th Edition / Mermaid notation reference spells.

plugins.name: hermes-tweet
plugins.description: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for read-first social monitoring and approval-gated actions.
